title: Smoked Italian Harira Dip
description: A twist on the traditional Italian appetizer, this smoked harira dip is served with melted cheese and crusty bread.
instructions: In a saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked harira, grated cheese, and Italian seasoning to the saucepan.
Stir until the cheese is melted and the mixture is smooth.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Serve hot with crusty Italian bread.
Garnish with additional smoked harira, if desired.
